choices.text: DBB sequential: design fully → bid → low bidder. CMAR: CM hired during design provides pre-con services, gives GMP at design end, then becomes GC. CMAR more collaborative; cost certainty earlier; better for complex projects.

questions.explanation: CMAR early contractor + GMP vs DBB sequential.

choices.text: Design-Build: single entity designs + builds in parallel. Faster delivery, single point of accountability, better collaboration. Owner has one contract. Cost certainty earlier via GMP. Less independent oversight tradeoff.
